title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.405 - False swearing a class one offense
text:
115.405.  False swearing a class one offense. — Any person making a sworn statement, affidavit or declaration of candidacy required by this subchapter who swears falsely or signs such document knowing the statements therein are untrue shall be deemed guilty of a class one election offense.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 10.205) 
Effective 1-01-78
